steps.title: Answer Text 1 with Text 2
steps.content: Text 1 presents a problem: countries define urban settlements differently, making comparisons difficult. Text 2 describes a new global measure that establishes shared criteria for cities, towns, and rural areas.

steps.title: Reject off-target responses
steps.content: Choice A says Text 2 recommends more investigation, but it describes an already developed measure. Choice B says researchers should switch topics, and Choice D adds more difficulties; neither matches Text 2's role. The remaining response identifies the new measure as a possible solution. The answer is C.
